summary: Phase E: Sales Discount Request Workflow - Complete Testing. Backend: 19/19 tests passed covering staff discount request creation (percentage/fixed/order ref), staff listing, admin queue with KPIs, admin filtering, admin detail view, approve/reject workflow, duplicate approval rejection, and margin floor protection. Frontend: Admin Discount Requests page verified with KPI cards (Total/Pending/Approved/Rejected), filters, table with all columns, detail drawer with margin impact block and approve/reject buttons. Staff Discount Requests page verified with table, New Request button, and modal with all form fields (quote_ref, order_ref, customer_name, customer_email, discount_type, discount_value, urgency, reason, notes, item_notes). Navigation verified: Discount Requests appears in admin sidebar under Commerce, and Discounts appears in staff sidebar.
seed_data_creation: Test discount requests created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase E Sales Discount Request Workflow is complete and verified. Key points: 1) POST /api/staff/discount-requests creates discount request with JWT auth (staff name, email, id extracted). 2) GET /api/staff/discount-requests lists staff's own requests. 3) GET /api/admin/discount-requests returns queue with KPIs (total, pending, approved, rejected). 4) GET /api/admin/discount-requests?status=pending filters by status. 5) GET /api/admin/discount-requests/{request_id} returns detail view. 6) PUT /api/admin/discount-requests/{request_id}/approve approves with margin re-validation. 7) PUT /api/admin/discount-requests/{request_id}/reject rejects with admin note. 8) Margin floor protection prevents approval of margin-unsafe discounts. 9) Approved discounts stamp onto source quote/order via approved_discount field. 10) Admin page has data-testid attributes: admin-discount-requests-page, discount-kpi-row, kpi-total/pending/approved/rejected, discount-filters, filter-all/pending/approved/rejected, discount-requests-table, request-row-{id}, discount-detail-drawer, margin-impact-block, admin-note-input, approve-discount-btn, reject-discount-btn. 11) Staff page has data-testid attributes: sales-discount-requests-page, new-discount-request-btn, sales-discount-table, discount-request-modal, input-quote-ref, input-order-ref, input-customer-name, input-customer-email, select-discount-type, input-discount-value, select-urgency, input-reason, input-notes, input-item-notes, submit-discount-request-btn. 12) Navigation: Discount Requests in admin sidebar under Commerce, Discounts in staff sidebar.

backend_staff_endpoints.POST /api/staff/discount-requests (fixed: PASS - Creates request with fixed amount
backend_staff_endpoints.POST /api/staff/discount-requests (order: PASS - Creates request with order reference

backend_business_logic.Margin floor protection: PASS - Large discounts flagged as margin unsafe
backend_business_logic.Required fields validation: PASS - All fields present in response

frontend_admin_page.Approve/Reject buttons: PASS - Both present for pending requests
